purpose: UI contract to prevent component weights being mislabeled as feature importance.
global_rules: Reproducibility panels are read-only and must not feed main scoring calculations.
Do not fake SHAP, coefficients, feature importances, or scenario sensitivities.
If panel status is unavailable, show a missing-data card.
If status is component_weight_only, label chart as component contribution, not feature importance.

PED VKT per capita.caveat: Inner HPO/static-solver rebuild remains a future audit layer.
PED VKT per capita.feature_importance: Not available; C1 100% is component contribution only.

Light RUC volume.caveat: Feature importance/coefficient/sensitivity panels available from replay pack.
Light RUC volume.feature_importance: Available from replay pack, not SHAP.

Heavy RUC volume.caveat: Feature importance panel currently component contribution only; per-component features require component-level replay.
